nodalDepartmentName.label: Department of Social Justice and Empowerment

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The Widow Remarriage Scheme under the Government of Himachal Pradesh aims to support the rehabilitation of widows by encouraging men to marry widows through a monetary incentive. Under this scheme, a grant is provided to bona fide Himachali men (above 21 years) and women (above 18 years) at the time of marriage.
schemeContent.benefits_md: If any widow re-marries, a cheque of ₹ 20,000/- is given to the women and a Fix Deposit worth ₹ 30,000/- for the 5 years term is given to the couple.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support the rehabilitation of widows by encouraging marriage through a monetary incentive. It provides a grant to bona fide Himachali men (above 21 years) and women (above 18 years) at the time of marriage.

children.text: The Widow Remarriage Scheme under the Government of Himachal Pradesh aims to support the rehabilitation of widows by encouraging men to marry widows through a monetary incentive. Under this scheme, a grant is provided to bona fide Himachali men (above 21 years) and women (above 18 years) at the time of marriage.
If any widow re-marries, a cheque of ₹ 20,000/- is given to the women and a Fix Deposit worth ₹ 30,000/- for the 5 years term is given to the couple.
Step 1: Visit the CDPO (Child Development Project Officer) office and collect the
Step 2: Fill out the form with required details and attach all necessary documents.
Step 3: Submit the completed application form at the CDPO office for verification and further processing.

applicationProcess.process_md: Step 1: Visit the CDPO (Child Development Project Officer) office and collect the [application form.](https://cdn.s3waas.gov.in/s348aedb8880cab8c45637abc7493ecddd/uploads/2018/11/2018111253.pdf) Step 2: Fill out the form with required details and attach all necessary documents. Step 3: Submit the completed application form at the CDPO office for verification and further processing.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The widow should have remarried.
1. The applicant should be a resident of Himachal Pradesh.
1. Groom should not be less than 21 years of age
1. Women should not be less than 18 years of age.

children.text: The applicant should be a resident of Himachal Pradesh.
Groom should not be less than 21 years of age
Women should not be less than 18 years of age.
